original_snippet_context: Discussion about import taxes on books and their impact on national production and prices.
relevant_quote: E com isso não lucra absolutamente o publico ledor ; o livro, feito aqui ou alhures, custa sempre muito caro, avaliando os livreiros o valor do franco, para os importadas, em mil réis, quer esteja o cambio a 12 ou suba a 24 dinheiros.
justification: This part of the text discusses the pricing practices of booksellers in relation to the exchange rate but doesn't mention or advocate for any stance relating to the Caixa de Conversão or its effects. While it references exchange rates, it doesn't discuss the *fixation* of the exchange rate as would be relevant to the Caixa.
